title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Supporting Actor Winners
text: The 2026 Golden Globe Awards ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser and airing January 11 on CBS, recognized outstanding supporting performances across film and television. In the film category, Stellan Skarsgård claimed the award for Best Supporting Male Actor in a Motion Picture for his role in Sentimental Value, defeating nominees including Adam Sandler, Benicio del Toro, Jacob Elordi, Paul Mescal, and Sean Penn. In television, Owen Cooper won Best Supporting Male Actor on Television for his performance in Adolescence. The competitive field included Ashley Walters, Billy Crudup, Jason Isaacs, Tramell Tillman, and Walton Goggins. The Golden Globes noted that Adolescence proved particularly successful across multiple categories, as Stephen Graham also won in the Limited Series/Anthology category, demonstrating the project's strong performances throughout the evening. The supporting actors awards recognized both established and rising talent, reflecting the diverse slate of nominees across both film and television categories.
